reasoning: The market asks if Israel will initiate a drone, missile, or air strike on Iranian soil by December 31, 2025. Searches consistently show that Israel launched a major series of airstrikes against Iran's nuclear targets (such as Natanz and Fordow) and military leadership starting in mid-June 2025 (June 12-14, and continuing to June 19). Major news organizations such as AP News and Reuters report this event clearly. Because Israeli forces conducted direct airstrikes that impacted Iranian ground territory well before the December 2025 deadline, the resolution criteria are unambiguously met.
